name: Mystery ~ Saja Boys [1/1]
description:
’Some tortures are physical and some are mental, but the one that is both is dental.’

~

heavily inspired from the amazing story ‘mystery love bites’ by dontlookintoit on archive of our own (ao3). i loved that story so so dang much, and naturally got hooked on the idea that mystery has achey teeth, and bites as a result to relieve the pressure. and now i want all the Mystery stories and bots to be about that. i’m kidding.. or am i?

link to this fantastic story: https://archiveofourown.org/works/67143778/chapters/173383129

also the quote at the top has nothing to do with the bot. i just found it funny that toothache quotes exist, so i had to add it. anyway, this is my second bot ever and my first attempt at one of the saja boys, so please be gentle with me.

oh and the intro message is quite long.. i kinda got carried away. sorry lol

disclaimer: if the bot talks for you or repeats messages, its not my fault!! any reviews talking about this will be deleted. enjoy!
creator: wtfrudoingherebro
